mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pet_health_record (pet_id, record_date, weight, height, body_condition, appetite, energy_level, notes, create_time) VALUES (#{petId}, #{recordDate}, #{weight}, #{height}, #{bodyCondition}, #{appetite}, #{energyLevel}, #{notes}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT phr.*, p.name as pet_name, p.cover as pet_cover, u.username as owner_name, u.avatar as owner_avatar FROM pet_health_record phr LEFT JOIN pet p ON p.id = phr.pet_id LEFT JOIN pet_adopt_order pao ON pao.pet_id = p.id AND pao.status = 4 LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = pao.user_id WHERE phr.id = #{id}

SELECT phr.*, p.name as pet_name, p.cover as pet_cover, u.username as owner_name, u.avatar as owner_avatar FROM pet_health_record phr LEFT JOIN pet p ON p.id = phr.pet_id LEFT JOIN pet_adopt_order pao ON pao.pet_id = p.id AND pao.status = 4 LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = pao.user_id WHERE phr.pet_id = #{petId} ORDER BY phr.record_date DESC

SELECT phr.*, p.name as pet_name, p.cover as pet_cover, u.username as owner_name, u.avatar as owner_avatar FROM pet_health_record phr LEFT JOIN pet p ON p.id = phr.pet_id LEFT JOIN pet_adopt_order pao ON pao.pet_id = p.id AND pao.status = 4 LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = pao.user_id WHERE pao.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY phr.record_date DESC
